blockingIssues.description: getPanoraQuote() does not implement the required quote contract; feature requires a quote endpoint/shape but implementation posts to /swap and reuses swap payload semantics.
Routing path is synthesized as `${from} → ${to} via Panora` instead of parsing and displaying actual Panora route path details.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Align mission feature skillName values with actually available runtime skills (e.g., avoid assigning `frontend-ui-worker` when only `frontend-worker` is installed in worker runtime).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: shared-constants-usd1, multi-stablecoin-selector, and panora-swap-routing review artifacts all recorded runtime fallback from unavailable `frontend-ui-worker` to `frontend-worker`.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify and pin the Panora quote API contract in mission guidance/validation contract (endpoint, method, expected response fields, and when API key is required).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review for panora-swap-routing found contract mismatch between mission expectations and implementation choices, including endpoint/method ambiguity and route-path extraction expectations.

rejectedObservations.observation: Duplicate reports of the same frontend skill-name mismatch across multiple feature reviews.
Claim that a hardcoded Panora API key alone constitutes a shared-state update candidate.
